ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vicars" (
  "vicar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vicar */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the vicar */,
  "ordination_date" TEXT /* Date of ordination */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vicar */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the vicar */,
  "home_parish_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parish where the vicar is from */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the vicar */,
  "address" TEXT /* Current residential address of the vicar */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vicar (e.g., active, retired, on leave) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vicar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parishes" (
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parish */,
  "parish_name" TEXT /* Name of the parish */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the parish */,
  "diocese" TEXT /* Diocese to which the parish belongs */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the parish */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the parish was founded */,
  "current_vicar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current vicar serving the parish */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the parish's website */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the parish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parishes_current_vicar_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_vicar_id") REFERENCES vicars ("vicar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "vicar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vicar */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parish */,
  "from_date" TEXT /* Start date of the appointment */,
  "to_date" TEXT /* End date of the appointment */,
  "designation" INTEGER /* Designation of the vicar during the appointment */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for the vicar leaving the parish (e.g., transfer, retirement) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the appointment */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the appointment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_designation FOREIGN KEY ("designation") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_vicar_id FOREIGN KEY ("vicar_id") REFERENCES vicars ("vicar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designation */,
  "hierarchy_level" INTEGER /* Hierarchical level of the designation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational record */,
  "vicar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vicar */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained */,
  "institute" TEXT /* Institute where the degree was obtained */,
  "year_of_completion" INTEGER /* Year of completion */,
  "major" TEXT /* Major field of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_vicar_id FOREIGN KEY ("vicar_id") REFERENCES vicars ("vicar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "vicar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vicar */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "date_received" TEXT /* Date the achievement was received */,
  "awarded_by" TEXT /* Entity or person who awarded the achievement */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the achievement (e.g., service, leadership) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_vicar_id FOREIGN KEY ("vicar_id") REFERENCES vicars ("vicar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disciplinary_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "vicar_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vicar */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of disciplinary action */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "date_of_action" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the person who reviewed the disciplinary action */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the disciplinary action was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disciplinary_actions_vicar_id FOREIGN KEY ("vicar_id") REFERENCES vicars ("vicar_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, vicar, parish staff) */,
  "parish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parish the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_parish_id FOREIGN KEY ("parish_id") REFERENCES parishes ("parish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of login attempts for the access event */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
